mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 0 AND p.status = 0 AND p.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.permission_code) != ''
SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM permission p WHERE p.status = 0 AND p.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.permission_code) != ''
